output: Implemented T1. Zustand was added, a new generic entity-scoped store factory was created at `src/shared/state/createEntityStore.ts`, and focused tests were added at `src/shared/state/createEntityStore.test.ts` covering bootstrap precedence, shared-store lazy load behavior, optimistic debounced saves, text-field flush behavior, revert/reset semantics, and selector isolation. I also updated the local `megaplan/m1-foundation-store` branch ref to `origin/main` without switching away from the dirty worktree, then verified the new work with the targeted Vitest run and `npx tsc --noEmit`.
